The '''Corulag-Jatir Hyperroute''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace trade route]] that connected [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], located near the intersection of the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] and [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]], to [[Jatir]] on the border of [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] and the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] a [[Arcon Multinode Agricorp|Arcon Multinode]] container ship was involved in a micrometeorite collision, along the route, and reverted back from [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] clogging the route with debris, and forcing the closure of the hyperroute until it could be cleared of the debris.

==Appearances==
